name: Apex Automobile Testing
address: 62 Vrindavan Colony, Gawali Palasiya, MHOW, Indore, MP 453441
terms: \textbf{Scope of Service:} Services include test driver and instrumentation technician support for vehicle testing activities. Personnel will operate as per instructions provided by the client’s engineering/testing team. \\ \textbf{Service Charges} Charges are on per day / per shift basis (8--10 hours). Overtime (if applicable) will be charged extra on pro-rata basis. Applicable GST (18 percent) will be charged extra. \\ \textbf{Working Hours and Overtime} Standard working hours: 8 hours per day. Overtime beyond this will be charged at 1.25x. Weekly off / holiday working will be charged extra. \\ \textbf{Travel, Boarding and Lodging} If services are required outside base location, travel, accommodation, and food to be provided by client OR reimbursed at actuals. Local conveyance to be provided or reimbursed. \\ \textbf{ Client Responsibilities} Client shall ensure safe and test-ready vehicle condition, required permissions and track access, and insurance coverage of vehicle during testing. Any damage due to vehicle condition or test environment shall not be liability of Apex Automobile Testing. \\ \textbf{Liability Clause} Driver and technician will perform duties with due care. However, Apex Automobile Testing shall not be liable for any vehicle damage, accident, or consequential loss during testing or driving on roads. Client must ensure vehicle is insured. \\ \textbf{Safety and Compliance} All testing shall follow client safety protocols. Any specific safety or compliance requirement must be explained by client. Required safety gear (helmet, safety suit, seatbelt, etc.) shall be provided by client. \\ \textbf{Payment Terms} Payment within 15--30 days from invoice date. \\ \textbf{Cancellation / Minimum Billing} Minimum billing: 1 full day. Cancellation within 24 hours -- 50 percent charge. Same day -- 100 percent charge. \\ \textbf{Replacement Clause} In case of unavailability of personnel, equivalent replacement will be provided. No additional cost unless skill upgrade requested. \\ \textbf{Confidentiality} All test data, vehicle details, and project information will be kept strictly confidential. \\ \textbf{Force Majeure} No liability for delays due to natural calamities, strikes, or government restrictions. \\ \textbf{ Jurisdiction} Subject to jurisdiction of Indore, Madhya Pradesh. \\ \textbf{Scope of Supply:} Apex Automobile Testing shall supply instruments or equipment as per the quotation. Scope is limited to procurement and delivery unless explicitly stated otherwise. \\ \textbf{Installation and Commissioning:} Installation and commissioning shall be carried out by the respective Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) or authorized vendor. Apex Automobile Testing will only coordinate between client and vendor and shall not be responsible for execution, delays, or performance. \\ \textbf{Service and Support:} All after-sales service, warranty, calibration, and technical support shall be provided directly by the respective OEM or vendor. Apex Automobile Testing acts only as a coordination partner and shall not be liable for service issues or delays. \\ \textbf{ Warranty:} Warranty shall be as per OEM or vendor terms. Any claims shall be handled directly between client and OEM or vendor. Apex Automobile Testing may assist in coordination on best effort basis only. \\ \textbf{Limitation of Liability:} Apex Automobile Testing liability is limited strictly to supply of goods. It shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages including loss of business, data, or revenue arising from use of supplied equipment. \\ \textbf{Delivery Terms:} Delivery timelines are indicative and subject to availability from OEM or suppliers. Delays due to logistics, supplier issues, or force majeure shall not attract any penalty. \\ \textbf{ Installation and Travel Charges:} Installation, travel, lodging, and boarding charges if applicable shall be charged extra on actuals or as mutually agreed. \\ \textbf{ Acceptance of Goods:} Materials shall be deemed accepted if no discrepancy is reported within 7 days of delivery. \\
invoice_terms: Payment is due within 30 days from the date of invoice. Late payments may incur interest at 2% per month. All disputes must be raised within 7 days of receipt of invoice. Goods once sold will not be taken back. This invoice is subject to local jurisdiction. GST and other applicable taxes as per government norms. Cheque payments should be made in favor of the company name. Bank details are provided for electronic transfers.
